ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family the species belongs to */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order the species belongs to */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Current conservation status of the species */,
  "iucn_red_list_link" TEXT /* Link to the IUCN Red List entry for the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Human population of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_per_capita" INTEGER /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeding_pairs" (
  "breeding_pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breeding pair estimate */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the breeding pair belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the breeding pair is found */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the breeding pair estimate */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the breeding pair estimate */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the breeding pair estimate (1-3) */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated total population of the species in the country */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the breeding pair estimate */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the breeding pair estimate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the breeding pair estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breeding_pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breeding_pairs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breeding_pairs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend estimate */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the population trend belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the population trend is found */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population trend estimate was made */,
  "trend" INTEGER /* Trend of the population (+1, -1, or 0) */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the population trend */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the population trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population trend estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_quality" (
  "conservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation quality estimate */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the conservation quality belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the conservation quality is found */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of conservation (1-3) */,
  "conservation_efforts" TEXT /* Description of the conservation efforts in place for the species in the country */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the conservation quality estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_quality_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_quality_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the reference */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the reference was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the reference */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being accessed */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the data belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the data is found */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., breeding pairs, population trend) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version of the data */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "baselines" (
  "baseline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baseline population */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the baseline population belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the baseline population is found */,
  "baseline_population" INTEGER /* Baseline population size */,
  "baseline_year" INTEGER /* Year when the baseline population was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the baseline population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baseline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baselines_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baselines_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
